[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101100 3
1 000000101 2
2 001011011 5
3 010100111 5
4 100010010 3
5 000100001 2
6 101100110 5
7 100010111 5

70 111011101 7
